items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to the kill switch for rogue agent behavior. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or testing of this specific functionality. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address this scenario, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of the expected outcome.
